who: insurance adjusters in mid-sized insurance firms processing 10–20 claims/month
offer: For insurance adjusters in mid-sized insurance firms processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient follow-up processes cause delayed claim resolutions. We automate scheduling and tracking instead of manual tracking and scheduling via spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient follow-up processes for insurance claims
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Participate in forums where adjusters share tools and tips
try_it: Let users try simple dashboard for tracking claims status
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for follow-ups
Allow CSV import for existing claim data
Enable one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
